query:
-- 1. Create listings table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  propertyId INT REFERENCES properties(id),
  agentId INT NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  listingStatus ENUM('active', 'terminated', 'expired') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  listPrice DECIMAL(12,2),
  listDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  expirationDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  mlsNumber VARCHAR(64),
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- 2. Update transaction status enum: active, under_contract, closed, terminated
ALTER TABLE transactions MODIFY COLUMN status ENUM('active', 'under_contract', 'closed', 'terminated') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active';

-- 3. Update transaction type enum: only buyer and seller
ALTER TABLE transactions MODIFY COLUMN transactionType ENUM('buyer', 'seller') NOT NULL;

-- 4. Add commission type field to transactions (percentage vs flat)
ALTER TABLE transactions ADD COLUMN commissionType ENUM('percentage', 'flat') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'percentage' AFTER commissionRate;

-- 5. Update payout payeeType enum to include savvy_str_agents and exp, remove brokerage
ALTER TABLE transaction_payout_items MODIFY COLUMN payeeType ENUM('agent', 'savvy_str_agents', 'exp', 'group_leader', 'referral_partner', 'isa_bonus', 'other') NOT NULL;

-- 6. Add commission type to payout items too
ALTER TABLE transaction_payout_items ADD COLUMN commissionType ENUM('percentage', 'flat') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'percentage' AFTER percentage;
